zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume de Blois於1082年出生在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉哈特雷-德-布利塔尼時，他的父親Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux37歲，母親Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois20歲。他於大約1094年與Agnès de Sully在法國艾-吉洛易哈特雷斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於從1159年10月11日到1160年在法國奧其坦尼豪-加洛圖勞斯，埋葬在法國努維勒-阿吉泰維安蒙特莫利隆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guillaume de Blois于1082年出生在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉哈特雷-德-布利塔尼时，他的父亲Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux37岁，母亲Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois20岁。他于大约1094年与Agnès de Sully在法国艾-吉洛易哈特雷斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于从1159年10月11日到1160年在法国奧其坦尼豪-加洛圖勞斯，埋葬在法国努維勒-阿吉泰維安蒙特莫利隆。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Blois
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Blois in Loire-et-Cher and, in some cases possibly also from a place of the same name in Jura. Compare   Deblois  .
French: nickname from the Old French adjective blois ‘lisping’.

variants.name: Bloise
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rolando, Salvatore, Biagio, Carmelo, Giulio.  Spanish Alejandro, Ines, Jose, Juan Antonio, Luis.
Italian (Calabria): from French Blois . The surname Bloise is also found in southern France (Bouches-du-Rhône) and in the Dominican Republic.
English (Suffolk): variant of   Blois  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Deblois
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Rosaire, Amelie, Damien, Emile, Fernand, Herve, Jacques, Jean Guy, Monique, Ovide.
French: habitational name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, for someone from Blois (see Blois ).

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume de Blois was born in 1082, in Chartres-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, his father, Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux, was 37 and his mother, Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois, was 20. He married Agnès de Sully about 1094, in Chartres, Eure-et-Loir, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died from 11 October 1159 to 1160, in Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, France, and was buried in Montmorillon, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume de Blois est né en 1082, à Chartres-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, son père, Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Agnès de Sully environ 1094, à Chartres, Eure-et-Loir, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé du 11 octobre 1159 au 1160, à Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, France, et a été enterré à Montmorillon, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guillaume de Blois 1082 in Chartres-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux 37 und seine Mutter Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois 20. Er hat um 1094 in Chartres, Eure-et-Loir, Frankreich Agnès de Sully geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb von 11. Oktober 1159 bis 1160 in Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, Frankreich und wurde in Montmorillon, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume de Blois è nato il nel 1082 nel Chartres-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, il suo padre, Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Agnès de Sully circa 1094, nel Chartres, Eure-et-Loir, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì da 11 ottobre 1159 a 1160, nel Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, Francia, e fu sepolto a Montmorillon, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume de Bloisが1082年にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインチャートレス-デ-ブレタグンで生まれた時，父Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meauxは37歳，母Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Bloisは20歳であった。約1094年にフランスエウレ-エト-ロイルチャートレスでAgnès de Sullyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼はから1159年10月11日まで1160年にフランスオクシタニーハウテ-ガーオントウロウゼで死去し，フランスノウベレ-アクイティアインヴィエンモントモーイロンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume de Blois(이)가 1082년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 처트레스-데-브레타그니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1094년 프랑스 우레-트-로이르 처트레스에서 Agnès de Sully(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1159년 10월 11일부터 1160년 까지 프랑스 옥시탠이 하테-가니 토우루스에서 사망했으며 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 비니 몽모릴런에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume de Blois nasceu em 1082, em Chartres-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnès de Sully aproximadamente 1094, em Chartres, Eure-et-Loir, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu de 11 de outubro de 1159 a 1160, em Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, França, e foi sepultado em Montmorillon, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume de Blois родился в 1082 г. в местности чартрес-де-бретагн, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnès de Sully около 1094 г. в местности чартресь, эуре-ет-лоир, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер с 11 октября 1159 по 1160 в местности тоулоус, хауте-гаронн, окситани, Франция и был похоронен в местности монтмориллон, виенн, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guillaume de Blois nació en 1082, en Chartres-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Agnès de Sully aproximadamente 1094, en Chartres, Eure-et-Loir, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió desde 11 de octubre de 1159 hasta 1160, en Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, Francia, y fue sepultado en Montmorillon, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia.
